name: kilter-recovery-kit
description: Desktop recovery toolkit for investigating Kilter Board data on Android devices.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,tsc,electron -c blue,yellow,green "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on http://localhost:8101 dist/electron/main.js && node scripts/run-electron.js"
scripts.build: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:electron
